n: Book 1, Chapter 2: Experts on the Subject

steps.t: Isteron is outside the Tower of Ecthelion, in the Plaza of the Fountain, in Minas Tirith (Midsummer). Rodwen gave you some letters of introduction aut…
Two of the helpful hobbits that helped Isteron with some of the wedding preparations are relaxing nearby: Frodo Baggins and Samwise Gamgee!
Two of the helpful hobbits that helped Isteron with some of the wedding preparations are relaxing nearby: Frodo Baggins and Samwise Gamgee!
Frodo and Sam suggested that you follow the smell of pipe-smoke to find Merry and Pippin. Frodo and Sam provided some very helpful advice to Rodwen's …
Frodo and Sam suggested that you follow the smell of pipe-smoke to find Merry and Pippin. Frodo and Sam provided some very helpful advice to Rodwen's …
Merry is atop the wall south-east of the Plaza of the Fountain in Minas Tirith (Midsummer), very pleased with some recent mischief.
Pippin is atop the wall south-east of the Plaza of the Fountain in Minas Tirith (Midsummer), very pleased with some recent mischief.
Merry and Pippin, quite delighted with themselves, have caused some mischief. You should find Cúfaron at the base of the ramp from the Seventh Circle,…
Legolas stands by the pile of blue decorations, and despite his solemn expression you can tell he is also rather amused at the hobbits' prank.
Cúfaron is in the Sixth Circle of Minas Tirith (Midsummer).
